query: my father-in-law is 78 and wears reading glasses, he's been struggling with the tiny print on the market summary I sent him last week. can you regenerate it as a polished Word doc using the accessible theme so I can print it 100% on white paper for him this weekend? the markdown source is still in my downloads
Can you convert this markdown CMA I wrote for 188 Broadview into a .docx with the Jasmina Homes brand? Include the cover page and add my RE/MAX signature block at the end with the logo
ok so I rewrote my seller consultation guide in markdown for Sunday's open house on Danforth. turn it into a styled Word document in my usual brand, add my contact info in the footer

need a polished quarterly market update from the attached md file — use the RE/MAX Bridge palette, include my signature on page 1 with the logo, and make sure the comp table has zebra rows like last time
Make a professional Word doc out of this playbook draft using Anthropic's coral styling - the warm red accent one. Client deliverable going out Monday, needs to look like a real consultancy wrote it
my dad is going blind in one eye and even with new bifocals he gets tired reading contracts. can you make the enclosed disclosure document in big font for him? he needs to sign by Friday

I have a neighborhood profile for Leslieville typed up in markdown, can you turn it into a branded .docx for tomorrow's listing appointment at 42 Thorncliffe? jasminahomes style please, cover + table of comparable sales

convert this thinking memo I wrote into a nice Word document with the Anthropic coral styling. it's about AI adoption in real estate brokerages. feels long but I want it to read as polished, not academic
quick branded document for my sphere-of-influence email — one-pager about why now is a good time to list. my usual brand theme, include the signature block
can you take my March market recap markdown and make it styled, like the Coral brand? section per neighbourhood, some callouts for the top 3 sales of the month, professional cover page
I need to update the jasminahomes.md brand file to shift the secondary red to a darker burgundy. the current AA1120 feels too bright on my Brother inkjet. can you edit the brand token?
take this existing .docx report I've already made and just export it to PDF for me, no formatting changes needed, it's going into an email attachment in 10 minutes
help me write a compelling MLS listing description for 42 Thorncliffe. 3 bed, 2 bath, updated kitchen in 2023, steps to the subway. aim for 150-200 words, warm but not salesy
build me a PowerPoint deck in RE/MAX colours for my buyer consultation next Tuesday — navy headings, red accents, maybe 10 slides covering market trends, financing, and the search process
my father-in-law complains the fonts are too tiny on his iPhone Mail app. what settings can he change in iOS to make the text bigger without messing up everything else on the phone?
I want to copy the coral brand palette and Poppins/Georgia pairing into a Figma file so my graphic designer can work with it for a web landing page. what hex codes and font weights should she use?
spreadsheet request — need to build a tracker in Excel with the RE/MAX Bridge colors for my transactions this year. columns for address, list price, sale price, commission, close date
make a large print version of the 'no solicitation' sign for the front door of my open house. 11x17, bold, readable from the sidewalk. ideally as a PDF I can print at Staples
read the attached .docx and pull out the key dates, the buyer's name, and any contingencies into a bullet list I can paste into my transaction-tracking sheet
can you take my Google Doc (link in my message) and just export it as a .docx, preserving the formatting I already have? no rebranding, no styling changes — just the format conversion
